title: Visible Barrier Blocks
body:
This mod allows you to see Barrier Block.
This feature is **toggleable** by using an option in "Video Settings" or a keybind (default key is M)

![Visible Barrier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f44b37e59070a668199a8bcee4b8557f8c11b35a.png)



####  Note:
You can change the texture of the visible barrier block with a texturepack.
The texture file is located in "assets\visiblebarrierblocks\textures\block\barrier.png"
